payload.answer: I can help generate repair options, but the input doesn’t contain a clear memory fact or update to evaluate.
repair_options: Ask the user to clarify what, if anything, they want remembered.
Treat this as conversational filler and take no memory action.
If this was meant to confirm a prior proposed memory change, ask the user to restate the specific change before proceeding.
